name: Cactus, Inc.
business: Cactus, Inc. is primarily engaged in the design, manufacture, sale and rental of highly engineered pressure control and spoolable pipe technologies. Its products are sold and rented principally for onshore unconventional oil and gas wells and are utilized during the drilling, completion and production phases. The company also provides field services for all of its products and rental items.
sellsTo: onshore unconventional oil and gas wells
oil and natural gas exploration and production companies
customers in United States, Australia, Canada, Middle East

exposures.sentence: The Company is primarily engaged in the design, manufacture, sale and rental of highly engineered pressure control and spoolable pipe technologies.

catalysts.event: Acquisition of 65% of Baker Hughes Pressure Control LLC (Cactus International Joint Venture)
catalysts.sentence: On January 1, 2026 (the Closing Date), Baker Hughes Holdings LLC and certain of its affiliates sold 65% of the limited liability company membership interests in Baker Hughes Pressure Control LLC to Cactus UK Holding Limited.
